arts.ttl: Ebosele dreaming of Ireland start for 'a long time'
arts.sum: Speaking exclusively to RTÉ Sport's Tony O'Donoghue, Ebosele said: "Before the game, [assistant manager John] O'Shea told me 'You could be the reason we win the game today, be ready'. Festy Ebosele is hoping to nail down a place in the Republic of Ireland team after making a game-changing cameo in the UEFA Nations League win over Finland.

arts.ttl: England starting XI vs Finland as Lee Carsley DROPS Jordan Pickford after Greece blunders
arts.sum: England's interim head coach Lee Carsley has made changes to his team following their 2-1 loss to Greece in midweek with captain Harry Kane among the players to come back in

arts.ttl: England to make changes for Finland Nations League showdown after Greece defeat
arts.sum: Lee Carsley reveals that he will likely revert back to a less experimental playstyle when England play Finland on Sunday after their Nations League loss against Greece.

arts.ttl: How to watch Greece vs Republic of Ireland FOR FREE: TV channel and live stream for Nations League today
arts.sum: Boys in Green got their first win of the campaign against Finland

arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher sends message to England boss Lee Carsley after Greece horror show
arts.sum: Lee Carsley employed an attacking England lineup against Greece, albeit without a striker, but saw the Three Lions look vulnerable in defence and now they must bounce back against Finland

arts.ttl: Toughness can help Republic of Ireland ‘shine’ says Heimir Hallgrimsson
arts.sum: The Icelander wants to find a new Aron Gunnarsson.

arts.ttl: Greece v Republic of Ireland: All you need to know
arts.sum: The Greeks are coming into Sunday's match at Piraeus' Karaiskakis Stadium off the back of beating group favourites England 2-1 at Wembley to make it three wins from three in this edition of the Nations League. Watch Greece v Republic of Ireland in the UEFA Nations League on Sunday from 7pm on RTÉ2 and RTÉ Player.

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley wants to see reaction from England against Finland after Greece loss
arts.sum: The Euro 2024 runners-up’s hopes of securing promotion back to the top tier of the Nations League received a blow with defeat to Greece.

arts.ttl: 5 talking points as England look to respond to Greece defeat against Finland
arts.sum: Helsinki is the next Nations League stop for Lee Carsley’s men.

arts.ttl: Talking points as Republic of Ireland chase back-to-back wins against Greece
arts.sum: Ireland opened their Group B2 account with a 2-1 victory in Finland.
